name: Pecan Tart Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Mix flour, salt, and chilled butter in a food processor until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
3. Add ice water tablespoon by tablespoon and process just until a dough ball begins to form. Wrap dough and refrigerate until firm.
4. Roll dough out on a floured board into a 10 by 10-inch square. Fold dough in half, then into quarters, and place in an 8-inch square baking pan. Unfold dough and press firmly into the corners and sides of the pan. Refrigerate for 15 minutes.
5. Melt butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat and remove from heat. Stir in sugar and corn syrup until smooth. Add almond extract and vanilla extract, then add eggs and beat with a spoon until well blended.
6. Fold in toasted pecans and pour filling into the crust-lined pan. Place pan in the center of the oven and bake 50-60 minutes or until the filling is set. Cool on a wire rack and cut into small squares. Top each square with a pecan half.
